Off Calendar Oct-31-2022 Set For Trial On Oct-02-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-21-593924, CGC-21-593925, CGC-21-594430, CGC-21-594055, CGC-21-594059, CGC-21-594060, CGC-21-594082, CGC-21-594099 WITH CASE CGC-21-593922
Off Calendar Aug-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Gregory A. Mase; Ericksen Arbuthnot; 510-832-7770; appearing on behalf of defendants/cross-complainants Martin A. Friedman, Friedman Properties LP, and Friedman Investment Management Corp.
David F. Beach; Miller & Moskowitz, LLP; 707-525-8800; appearing on behalf of defendnt Chandler Properties.
Jethro S. Busch; Steven Adair MacDonald & Partners, P.C.; 415-956-6488; appearing on behalf of plaintiffs David Lowi and Amber Lowi.

Counsel for both the Friedman and Chandler defendants contest the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASES CGC-21-593924, CGC-21-593925, CGC-21-594430, CGC-21-594055, CGC-21-594059, CGC-21-594060, CGC-21-594082, CGC-21-594099 WITH CASE CGC-21-593922 is DENIED without prejudice for the request to consolidate for trial to be raised if the only remaining issue in the case is construction. The Court notes that the moving party failed to comply with SFRL 2.7B (no courtesy copies of the moving papers or reply provided). In the future such failure by the defendants or their counsel will result in the motions being taken off calendar.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Joinder By Defendant Chandler Properties In Motion By Friedman Properties, Lp, To Consolidate Nine Cases For All Purposes Including Trial
Off Calendar Aug-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Gregory A. Mase; Ericksen Arbuthnot; 510-832-7770; appearing on behalf of defendants/cross-complainants Martin A. Friedman, Friedman Properties LP, and Friedman Investment Management Corp.
David F. Beach; Miller & Moskowitz, LLP; 707-525-8800; appearing on behalf of defendnt Chandler Properties.
Jethro S. Busch; Steven Adair MacDonald & Partners, P.C.; 415-956-6488; appearing on behalf of plaintiffs David Lowi and Amber Lowi.

Counsel for both the Friedman and Chandler defendants contest the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

JOINDER BY DEFENDANT CHANDLER PROPERTIES IN MOTION BY FRIEDMAN PROPERTIES, LP TO CONSOLIDATE NINE CASES FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL is DENIED. The Court notes that the moving party failed to comply with SFRL 2.7B In the future such failure by the defendants or their counsel will result in the motions being taken off calendar.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Counsel for the Friedman defendants contests the court's tentative ruling. Mr. Mase asks the court if the ruling is made with or without prejudice.
